title: Subaquatic
description: Adds lots of ocean related things to 1.12.2! Including real ocean biomes, bug fixes, new mechanics, and more!
body:
### A mod that adds lots of ocean-related content, and fixes some bugs!
#### **Dependencies:** [Fluidlogged API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fluidlogged-api) (required) and [AssetMover](https://modrinth.com/mod/assetmover) (required on client)

---

**Bug Fixes (as of this mod's latest version):**
- [MC-1691](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-1691) (Sprinting/falling on thin/small blocks uses the block below for the particles)
- [MC-8820](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-8820) (Walking on thin/small blocks produces sounds from the blocks below them)
- [MC-118096](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-118096) (Incorrect position of particles when using bone meal on grass block)
- [MC-129794](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-129794) (Water particles are not biome-affected)
- [MC-130137](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-130137) (Grass and mycelium don't decay underwater)

---

**Big Features (as of this mod's latest version):**
- All ocean biomes from Update Aquatic!
- Bubble columns (works in ANY Material.WATER fluid!)
- Chest boats, ender chest boats, ender chest minecarts, crafting table boats, crafting table minecarts, and furnace boats!
- "Fish", cod, salmon, pufferfish, tropical fish entities!
- Glow lichen
- Hanging roots & rooted dirt (generates instead of dirt under all properly coded trees)
- Kelp, seagrass, sea pickles, and coral generation!
- Mud and mud bricks
- New villager type: Marine Biologist (see source code for trades)
- Froglights (currently only obtainable through marine biologist trades)
- Realistic fishing (fishing reels in actual fish entities instead of fish items! note that this mod also adds an enchantment that counteracts this)
- Serves a library mod for other mods to add their own custom ocean biomes!
- Smooth blocks (smooth stone, smooth sandstone, smooth red sandstone, smooth quartz, and smooth lapis lazuli)

---

**Small Features (as of this mod's latest version):**
- Baby zombies burn in daylight
- Beacon activation, deactivation, and ambient sounds
- Bubble pop particle and sound
- Bubble particles last longer
- Bubble particles appear when chests are opened underwater, and appear during underwater explosions
- C418 underwater ambient sounds and music
- Cauldrons apply water physics to entities
- Configurable biome blend radius size
- Configurable biome water surface and fog colors
- Faceless pumpkins from 1.13 (can be carved using shears)
- Fish buckets (works with any Material.WATER bucket)
- Gradual air replenishing mechanic from 1.13
- Items and xp orbs float on water
- Levers emit redstone dust particles while powered
- Pumpkins can be placed without a block below
- Toggleable enchantment glints for potions, xp bottles, and dragon's breath
- Translucent water bottles
- Translucent xp orbs
- Water particles (splashes, bubbles, etc) apply water biome colors, and respect modded fluid colors
- Vanilla's mushroom blocks, stems, and hyphae are craftable and silk touch-able
- Vanilla water buckets now use the forge bucket renderer to be consistent with modded buckets

---

**Planned Features (in order of priority):**
- More of the wild update's mangrove swamp content (frogs, tadpoles, etc)
- Dolphins
- Drowned
- Tridents
- Turtles
- Shipwrecks
- Buried treasure
- Conduits
- Phantoms
- Banner map icons

---

Using this mod alongside [Aqua Acrobatics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aqua-acrobatics) is highly recommended for the best experience!  

If you're a modpack developer wanting to add this mod to a CurseForge exclusive modpack, use [File Director](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/filedirector).

AssetMover can cause missing textures in certain cases. If you experience this, install [CensoredASM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lolasm) to fix it!

---

This mod was originally made for the 1.12.2 Ocean Modjam hosted by the 1.12.2 Modding Coalition

##### This mod will not be ported
